## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and ongoing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 420 articles by Saturday, with smooth automation](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Record-breaking performance: All-time highs in impressions and clicks, with 31 pages appearing in Google's AI Overviews](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [New initiatives: Industry/use case pages launching, editorial topics for AI agent architects proposed](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Link building temporarily dipped due to process changes, expected to recover soon](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Automation

  - [420 articles to be published by Saturday](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Large parts of publishing process automated with minimal hiccups](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [New industry and use case pages being developed](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [Trial pages for sales, insurance, and construction (Q1 top performers)](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
      - [Staging on non-live website for review](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
      - [Content to be drawn from well-performing published articles](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [All-time highs in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Impressions growing rapidly, clicks more sluggish](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [31 pages appearing in Google's AI Overviews](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Total search volume for AI Overview keywords: significant (exact figure not provided)](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Relevant queries include: "automation for insurance claims", "sales proposal automation", "RFP response automation"](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Exploring new reporting metrics beyond impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)

### SEO Tools and Reporting Challenges

  - [SEMrush data lagging significantly (e.g., showing only 7 monthly website hits)](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [AI Overview data also potentially lagging](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Google not providing direct data on AI Overview performance](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Team discussing pivot in reporting strategy due to limitations](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)

### Editorial Topics for AI Agent Architects

  - [New role-targeted content proposed by Thiago](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Topics listed in Airtable for review](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Proposed workflow: 2-3 topics at a time for feedback, work on outlines, then publish](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Seeking efficient review process to avoid overburdening Thiago's schedule](https://fathom.video/share/eza54JzrBywescy3Sg5ZnhUGFCgzPTs5?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
